role: Subprocess plugin for the meta CLI that registers `meta dashboard`: it resolves the `envctl` binary on PATH and shells out to `envctl dashboard --json`, injecting `--meta-file` (from $META_FILE or .meta.yaml walk-up) and relaying output to the meta host. Owns no dashboard logic itself — a fail-closed thin bridge to envctl-engine's zellij mission-control layout generator.
evidence: src/lib.rs execute()/resolve_envctl shells to `envctl dashboard --json`; main.rs registers plugin via meta_plugin_protocol; .meta.yaml:57 lists it; sole commit a1a74cc (2026-06-05, clean, synced)
notable: No README and no CI workflows; deliberately Cargo-standalone (empty [workspace] table, not in root Cargo.toml members) yet in parent .meta.yaml; origin-only FlexNetOS remote (original, not a fork); hard runtime dependency on `envctl` being on PATH

role: Subprocess plugin for the meta CLI exposing cargo commands (build/test/etc.) across all Rust projects in a meta workspace. main.rs registers the "rust" plugin via meta_plugin_protocol::run_plugin; lib.rs walks the .meta config tree, filters to directories with Cargo.toml, and returns execution plans for parallel cargo runs.
evidence: Cargo.toml (name=meta_rust_cli, deps on meta_plugin_protocol+meta_core), src/main.rs+src/lib.rs; HEAD a46f6e3 2026-06-12 (semantic PR title gate), clean main synced to origin
notable: No README at all; origin-only remote git@github.com:FlexNetOS/meta_rust_cli.git — commit 3051db3 re-pointed dead gitkb upstream org to FlexNetOS in CI URLs; 4 workflows incl. notify-parent.yml dispatching to the meta parent

role: Empty placeholder clone of FlexNetOS/my-wiki intended as a personal wiki/docs repo per .meta.yaml tags. Zero commits, zero files — nothing has ever been written to it.
evidence: working tree has only .git; git log: "branch 'master' does not have any commits yet"; .meta.yaml:226-228 (tags: [docs, wiki]); origin=git@github.com:FlexNetOS/my-wiki.git with origin/master [gone]
notable: Remote tracking branch [gone] (remote likely empty too); only artifact is .git/gitkb/code.db from the indexer; no upstream remote so no fork lineage; effectively an unstarted stub since Jun 3.

role: Catalog hub for network configs and service topology across the FlexNetOS workspace: registry.json is the source of truth, schema-validated by scripts/validate.py in CI per the FlexNetOS Hub Standard. The catalog is still empty (networks:[]); only README prose references exist so far.
evidence: registry.json (networks:[] v0.1.0), scripts/validate.py + .github/workflows/validate.yml, commits 6c75137 (scaffold 2026-06-04) / 0b0a21e (README refs 2026-06-08)
notable: Latest commit added 69 lines of Rust-networking-tool references to README only while registry.json stays empty — catalog data drifting into prose; origin is FlexNetOS/network_hub (original, no upstream), branch master

role: Data-only catalog of Claude Code plugins and marketplaces used across the FlexNetOS workspace: registry.json is the source of truth, with per-plugin entry docs and marketplace.json install snippets. scripts/validate.py enforces registry/schema/README consistency in CI per the FlexNetOS Hub Standard.
evidence: registry.json v0.2.0 (updated 2026-06-04) + registry.schema.json, scripts/validate.py, .github/workflows/validate.yml, entries/{ecc,oh-my-claudecode,claude-plugins}.md; commits 7a97d52/08a2cc3

role: Headless browser engine in Rust — 7-crate workspace (dom/net/browser/cdp/js/mcp/cli) running real JavaScript via V8 and speaking Chrome DevTools Protocol as a drop-in replacement for headless Chrome under Puppeteer/Playwright. Includes an obscura-mcp crate exposing browser automation to AI agents over MCP.
evidence: Cargo.toml (repository=h4ckf0r0day/obscura, 7 workspace crates); crates/obscura-{browser,cdp,js,mcp}; last commit 1950048 2026-05-18 by SGavrl
notable: Pure mirror fork: all 50 commits by upstream authors (SGavrl/h4ckf0r0day et al.), zero FlexNetOS commits; only remote is origin=FlexNetOS/obscura, no upstream remote; built locally (target/ present)

role: Fork of can1357's "omp" — a Bun/TypeScript + Rust terminal coding agent with IDE integration (packages: pi-coding-agent, pi-ai, pi-tui, mnemopi memory, swarm-extension; Rust crates: pi-shell, pi-natives, pi-ast). Functions as an alternative agent harness comparable to Claude Code, at upstream v15.8.3.
evidence: Cargo.toml repository=github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi v15.8.3; package.json name=omp-monorepo; HEAD f967f9d78 by can1357 (2026-06-03); origin=FlexNetOS/oh-my-pi

role: Rust (axum) local LLM inference server exposing OpenAI-, Ollama-, and Anthropic-compatible APIs over an Airframe/WebGPU engine with SafeTensors model management and auto-discovery. In this workspace it is the FlexNetOS fork acting as the local model-serving backend, recently patched (workspace-aware binary paths, test serialization) to live as a Cargo workspace member.

role: Registry-backed catalog of project/scaffold templates for the FlexNetOS meta workspace: registry.json + registry.schema.json validated by scripts/validate.py in CI, with template trees under templates/. Also defines the FlexNetOS "Hub Standard" (docs/hub-standard.md) and ships the canonical hub-standard skeleton as its one catalog entry.
evidence: registry.json (1 entry, v0.1.0), registry.schema.json, scripts/validate.py, docs/hub-standard.md, templates/hub-standard/; single commit e31a720 on master
notable: FlexNetOS-original (origin only, no upstream); one scaffold commit on master (not main); defines the Hub Standard other hubs follow; no code manifest — pure data+python hub

role: CLI proxy binary `rtk` that wraps dev commands (git, gh, cargo, npm/pnpm, pytest, docker, kubectl, etc.) and filters/compresses their output before it reaches LLM context, claiming 60-90% token savings. Includes SQLite-backed savings analytics (rtk gain), Claude Code hook integration that auto-rewrites commands, ~60 TOML filter configs, and a discover/learn subsystem that mines Claude Code history for missed optimizations.
evidence: Cargo.toml (rtk 0.42.0, repository=rtk-ai/rtk), src/main.rs + src/cmds/* filter modules, commits 7a34a06/975ca25 (2026-06-07), meta root Cargo.toml:14 + .meta.yaml provides:[rtk]
notable: Fork of rtk-ai/rtk (Patrick Szymkowiak; upstream PR #2002 in history) with only origin=FlexNetOS/rtk-tokenkill and no upstream remote; lives on develop branch; rusqlite bumped to 0.40 to fix the meta-workspace sqlite links conflict; ships its own .claude dev harness plus an openclaw plugin dir

role: Catalog/registry of CLI and developer tools used across the FlexNetOS meta workspace: registry.json + JSON schema as source of truth, with per-tool entry docs and install snippets. Consistency is CI-enforced via a stdlib-only scripts/validate.py per the FlexNetOS Hub Standard; currently catalogs exactly one tool (envctl).

role: FlexNetOS fork of the n8n workflow-automation platform (TS pnpm/turbo monorepo: packages/cli, core, workflow, nodes-base, frontend) used as an autonomous-harness testbed. The n8n-loop skill plus ralph-n8n.sh runner work a committed _workspace/ backlog (harness pillars, Claude-CLI to n8n-chat bridge, meta-codebase viz workflows) against a local n8n dev instance.
evidence: origin=FlexNetOS/n8n (no upstream remote, 1146 mirrored branches); commits c47ca8b998/524ab23b0a (2026-06-07 harness checkpoints); _workspace/{backlog.md,HANDOFF.md,loop_state.md}; .claude/plugins/n8n/skills/n8n-loop/scripts/ralph-n8n.sh; .github/workflows/harness-workflows-validate.yml

role: Rust multi-agent swarm simulation/prediction engine: ingests seed documents into a petgraph knowledge graph, spawns persona agents with redb-backed memory, and runs rayon/tokio parallel simulations served over an axum SSE API. Provider-agnostic LLM client (src/llm.rs) targets OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/local models.
evidence: Cargo.toml (teri 0.1.0, repository=SHA888/teri); src/{agent,sim,graph,memory,seed,report,api}+llm.rs; commits 561ab31/b56eed8 dated 2026-06-12; remotes origin=FlexNetOS/teri upstream=SHA888/teri
notable: Fork of SHA888/teri (itself a rewrite of Python MiroFish); no .github/workflows (CI gates enforced by parent meta repo per b56eed8); TODO.md is a stale Mar-2026 dev checklist (241 unchecked) with aspirational production-ready claims; CLAUDE.md is a generic plan-review prompt

role: Rust workspace of three crates (prompt-hub core lib, prompthub CLI, prompthub-server axum API) implementing prompt management for LLM agent swarms: libsql/SQLite storage, FTS5+ONNX hybrid search, RBAC, injection sanitization, audit logging, and a large feature-gated module matrix. It is being continuously built by an autonomous "construction crew" loop harness whose durable state lives in _workspace/ (backlog.md, loop_state.md, HANDOFF.md).
evidence: Cargo.toml workspace [prompt-hub,prompthub,prompthub-server]; hub.rs/storage.rs/routes.rs; commits 0b29dce + 26f83d8 ("chore(loop): ... cycle 80"); origin FlexNetOS/prompt_hub, no upstream, all-FlexNetOS history from 2026-06-07

role: Rust TTS CLI with six speech backends (say, piper, qwen, qwen-native, kokoro, voxtream) plus an MCP server, daemon, voice cloning/packs, STT, TUI, and a Claude-API streaming chat module. It is the spoken-feedback / voice-conversation tool used by agent sessions across this workspace.
evidence: Cargo.toml (vox 0.14.0 "Cross-platform TTS CLI"); src/backend/{say,piper,qwen,qwen_native,kokoro,voxtream}.rs; src/mcp.rs + daemon.rs + chat/claude_api.rs; commit e0be5c4 (FlexNetOS PR #1, English defaults)

role: Obsidian vault template that gives AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) persistent cross-session memory via TypeScript lifecycle hooks (session-start, classify-message, validate-write, qmd-refresh, pre-compact, stop-checklist) plus QMD semantic search. Ships a PKM scaffold (brain/, work/, org/, perf/) with templates, skills, and multi-agent configs rather than application code.

role: Capability vault/hub: ships a 307K auto-generated catalog of 1,508 agent skills (97 categories) plus a vendored (no nested .git) copy of pivoshenko/kasetto v3.0.0, a Rust CLI that declaratively installs/manages agent skills across machines. Also embeds a Claude Code feature-development harness plugin under kasetto/harness/ (.claude-plugin marketplace.json + plugin.json + skills).

role: Cargo workspace producing the single `rusty-idd` binary (crates/cli): an intent-driven-development merge control plane (crates/core scan/plan/manifest/validate), a Rust port of the Node OpenSpec lifecycle engine (crates/spec parse/validate/archive), and an agent task runner with ratatui TUI (crates/runner + crates/tui). It is itself the product of an in-house AI merge of three source tools, driven by the repo's own merge-orchestrator/idd-merge-loop harness.

role: Rust-native agent-to-agent session mesh: one static binary (interim 4-crate workspace weave-core/weave-inject/weave-mcp/weave) giving coding-agent sessions a shared SQLite/libSQL mailbox, an MCP server (weave_* tools incl. jobs, leases, schedules, orchestrator claim), and native push-injection into tmux/zellij/kitty/wezterm/screen panes.
